parsed_output.justification: Zack, Sean, and Hunter all claim to have held power roles (Seer, Troublemaker, and Robber) during the game, which are all Village-aligned. Jacob is the only player who does not claim a specific role and provides no role-based evidence for his innocence. Although Jacob suggests voting for himself, this behavior is often used by Werewolves to mimic the Tanner or by confused players, making him the most likely candidate for the Werewolf among the group.
